description: Jersey Core provides the foundational APIs, runtime utilities, provider discovery, message body processing, URI handling, and localization support used by Jersey 1.x JAX-RS clients and servers. It includes the Jersey implementation classes and bundled JAX-RS API types needed by higher-level Jersey modules to build RESTful web services on the JVM.

Jersey Core provides the foundational APIs, runtime utilities, provider discovery, message body processing, URI handling, and localization support used by Jersey 1.x JAX-RS clients and servers. It includes the Jersey implementation classes and bundled JAX-RS API types needed by higher-level Jersey modules to build RESTful web services on the JVM.
